falseNeighbors.risk: A discovery file may be mistaken for a complete governance package.
falseNeighbors.prohibitedFusion: Do not treat the presence of llms.txt as equivalent to policy, source precedence, Q-Layer, EAC, CCL, semantic-boundary, and routing artifacts.
falseNeighbors.requiredBehavior: Describe llms.txt as a discovery surface unless the rest of the package is present and declared.
